nasb.text: God said to Balaam, “Do not go with them; you shall not curse the people, for they are blessed.”

esv.text: God said to Balaam, “You shall not go with them. You shall not curse the people, for they are blessed.”

cnv.text: 神對巴蘭說：“你不可與他們同去，也不可咒詛那民，因為他們是蒙福的。”

ccb.text: 上帝对巴兰说：“你不可跟他们去，也不可咒诅那民族，因为那民族是蒙福的。”
